zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton於1415年1月5日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉時，他的父親Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccarton25歲，母親Elizabeth de Cathcart20歲。他和Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford至少有2個兒子。他去世於1472年7月2日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton was born on 5 January 1415, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccarton, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth de Cathcart, was 20. He had at least 2 sons with Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford. He died on 2 July 1472, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton est né le 5 janvier 1415, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccarton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Cathcart, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton am 5. Januar 1415 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccarton 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Cathcart 20. Er hatte mit Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 2. Juli 1472 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton è nato il il 5 gennaio 1415 nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccarton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Cathcart, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford. Morì il 2 luglio 1472, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccartonが1415年1月5日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで生まれた時，父Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccartonは25歳，母Elizabeth de Cathcartは20歳であった。彼はMargaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawfordとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1472年7月2日に故郷で57歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton(이)가 1415년 1월 5일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccarton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Cathcart(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1472년 7월 2일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Wallace 11th of Riccarton родился 5 января 1415 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wallace 10th of Riccarton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Cathcart, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Margaret de Dunbar Countess of Crawford. Он умер 2 июля 1472 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия.
